title: Stones of Eternity (Cheesy's Mod)
description: Adds a way to make items indestructible
body:
This mod adds the Stone of Eternity which allows you to make your tools and armor indestructible. Simply hold the item you wish to make indestructible in your off-hand and right-click with your Stone of Eternity in your main hand.


To create the Stone of Eternity you will need the following ingredients:


- Stone of Fire: rare drop from killing a blaze

- Stone of Water: rare drop from killing a guardian

- Stone of Earth: rare drop from mining stone

- Stone of Sky: rare drop from killing a phantom

- Stone of Chaos: guaranteed drop from killing the ender dragon

+4 stone

This mod also includes some optional quality of life changes as:
- Renewable lava (sources automatically renew like water)

These can be enabled in the "Stones of Eternity.json" config file, found in the config folder in your Minecraft folder
